name: echoshield-ai-crime-detection
description: AI-Powered Automatic Crime Detection & Evidence Collection System

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd frontend && npm run dev" "cd backend && npm run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently "cd frontend && npm run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3000" "cd backend && npm start"
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install

author: Arafathweb-maker
